Read-only consolidated dashboard for ClaimIndex data quality, Lawsuit/master integrity, and document-generation readiness. This page fetches existing read-only audit APIs and summarizes their status. It does not edit, save, restore, call Clio, call Graph, generate documents, finalize documents, upload documents, send email, print, queue, delete records, or write to the database.
